channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Peace Talks Underway: US and Iran Meet in Pakistan
item.description: Pakistan is currently hosting the second phase of peace talks between the United States and Iran, a significant development amidst ongoing tensions in the Middle East. The motorcade believed to be car...

item.title: Prosecution Pushes for Transparency on Duterte’s ICC Legal Team Status
item.description: The prosecution in the ongoing International Criminal Court (ICC) case involving former President Rodrigo Duterte has requested that the status of Duterte's legal team be made public. This move comes ...

item.title: Orange County deputies shoot suspect after domestic dispute escalates
item.description: Early on Friday morning, Orange County sheriff’s deputies shot a man in his 20s in Lake Forest following a domestic disturbance call. The incident began around 2:30 a.m. at a home in Rancho Mission Vi...

item.title: Aboriginal Veterans' Trauma, Activism, and the Fight for Self-Determination
item.description: This article delves into the often-overlooked experiences of Aboriginal Australians during and after World War I. It highlights the trauma faced by veterans like Louis Lacey, who struggled with the af...

item.title: Meta Expands AI Infrastructure with AWS Graviton Chips to Support Agentic Systems
item.description: Meta has announced a new partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS) to integrate tens of millions of AWS Graviton CPU cores into its computing infrastructure. This move is aimed at supporting the comp...

item.title: Study warns AI chatbots could subtly influence users through hidden advertising
item.description: Artificial intelligence chatbots are becoming a central part of daily life, helping users with everything from product recommendations to emotional support. This growing reliance has made them an attr...

item.title: Chelsea’s Estevao to Miss Rest of Season, World Cup Participation Uncertain
item.description: Chelsea don dey face tough time as their 19-year-old Brazilian winger, Estevao, don suffer hamstring injury for last week game wey dem lose 1-0 to Manchester United. Chelsea interim manager, Calum McF...

item.title: Court Continues Trial with More Evidence on Cash-to-Dollar Transactions Involving Yahaya Bello
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja has overruled an objection from former Kogi State Governor Yahaya Bello’s lawyer, allowing the prosecution to continue presenting evidence in his trial. The court heard...

item.title: Florida Democrat Resigns Amid Ethics Investigation, Still Registered for Re-election
item.description: Florida Representative Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick resigned from office just days after filing for re-election, amidst growing ethical scrutiny. The House Ethics Committee had been preparing to recomme...

item.title: Punjab Conducts Statewide Blackout Drill to Test Emergency Response
item.description: Punjab state recently conducted a statewide blackout mock drill on Friday evening, April 25, 2026, as part of a civil defence preparedness exercise. The drill, which lasted 15 minutes, began at 8:00 P...

item.title: B.C. RCMP Investigating Possible Connection Between Kenneth Law and Provincial Suicide Cases
item.description: The British Columbia RCMP have confirmed they are conducting an ongoing investigation into potential links between certain suicide deaths in the province and parcels distributed by Kenneth Law. Law, a...

item.title: Sacking coaches rarely fixes struggling teams, evidence suggests
item.description: This opinion piece argues that the mid-season sacking of coaches in professional sport is largely ineffective and often symbolic rather than practical. Using the St George Illawarra Dragons’ dismissal...

item.title: Macron warns Europe that Trump, Putin and Xi are all opposed to its interests
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron has warned that Europe faces a rare moment in which the leaders of the United States, Russia and China are all opposed to European interests. Speaking in English durin...

item.title: Conflicting signals over US-Iran talks as tensions escalate amid ongoing regional conflict
item.description: Developments in the ongoing conflict between the United States and Iran remain uncertain, with contradictory claims emerging about possible diplomatic engagement. Former US President Donald Trump stat...

item.title: Bryan Kohberger's mother describes close relationship and initial denial in FBI interviews after Idaho murders
item.description: Newly revealed FBI interview transcripts shed light on the reaction of Bryan Kohberger’s mother, Maryann Kohberger, following his arrest for the 2022 murders of four University of Idaho students. In h...

item.title: Calcutta High Court rules against blanket ban on motorcycle riding during Bengal elections
item.description: On 25th April 2026, the Calcutta High Court delivered a judgement stating that the Election Commission of India (ECI) cannot impose a blanket restriction on motorcycle commuting in West Bengal during ...

item.title: Meloni Urges NATO Unity Amid US Concerns Over Spain’s Stance on Iran
item.description: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni don talk say NATO need to remain united, she believe say na strong thing be that. Dis statement come after America dey think say make dem deal with Spain for no s...

item.title: George Wambugu Positions Himself as UDA's Leading Candidate for Ol Kalou By-Election
item.description: As the by-election in Ol Kalou gains momentum, George Wambugu, a UDA parliamentary aspirant, is emerging as a frontrunner with a clear vision for development. Wambugu, popularly known as 'Delight,' st...

item.title: Luxury Travel Agencies Redefine Safari Experiences with Personalized, Experience-Driven Itineraries
item.description: The article explores how modern travelers are shifting away from postponing “bucket-list” trips and instead choosing to pursue meaningful, experience-driven travel now. According to a 2024 McKinsey & ...

item.title: Disruptions during Welcome to Country overshadow parts of Anzac Day ceremonies in Sydney and Melbourne
item.description: Thousands gathered across Australia to mark Anzac Day, attending dawn services to honour those who served and died in military conflicts. In Sydney’s Martin Place, a large crowd assembled before sunri...
